Operation 'listQuizzes' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary 'List quizzes' is too generic. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering capability. Description lacks details about what fields are returned in each quiz item and authentication requirements, which are important for AI agents to understand the response structure and access requirements.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of published, approved quizzes. Supports filtering by category, difficulty, tags, and free-text topic search.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of published, approved quizzes. Supports filtering by category, difficulty, tags, and free-text topic search. Each quiz item includes metadata such as title, description, question count, and difficulty level. Requires authentication via Bearer token.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'List quizzes' is too generic. Enhanced summary to indicate filtering capability. Description lacks details about what fields are returned in each quiz item and authentication requirements, which are important for AI agents to understand the response structure and access requirements.

message: Operation 'getQuestions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary 'Get questions' is too vague and doesn't convey the dual-mode functionality. Description explains the two modes but lacks clarity about response structure and authentication. Enhanced summary to indicate flexibility and filtering. Expanded description to clarify the dual-mode behavior more explicitly, specify what question details are returned, and include authentication requirements for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Two modes: (1) Pass quiz_id to get ordered questions for a specific quiz. (2) Omit quiz_id to browse questions across all published quizzes with pagination, filtering, and optional randomization.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve quiz questions with flexible filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves quiz questions in two modes: (1) Quiz-specific mode - pass quiz_id to get ordered questions for a specific quiz; (2) Browse mode - omit quiz_id to search questions across all published quizzes with pagination, filtering by category/difficulty/tags, and optional randomization. Returns paginated results with question details including type, difficulty, and answer options. Requires authentication via Bearer token.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get questions' is too vague and doesn't convey the dual-mode functionality. Description explains the two modes but lacks clarity about response structure and authentication. Enhanced summary to indicate flexibility and filtering. Expanded description to clarify the dual-mode behavior more explicitly, specify what question details are returned, and include authentication requirements for better AI agent interpretability.
